exercises.title: Attack Complexity Analysis
exercises.description: Compare expected vs actual SIDH security.

exercises.title: Attack Timeline Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate attack discovery and response timeline.
exercises.task: Model how quickly the cryptographic community responded.

exercises.title: Information Content Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze how much info auxiliary points reveal.
exercises.task: Compare bits in auxiliary data vs secret.
hints: Auxiliary data is 8 field elements over F_p²

exercises.title: Lesson Extractor
hints: Think about what went wrong with SIDH
